situation: audit-2026-07-08-046 finding SP-ENG-L-002: extractSunsetWindowData accesses weatherCity.daily.sunset[0] without checking array exists/non-empty. Open-meteo API returning empty sunset array causes TypeError, caller try/catch silently returns null → entire city data lost for that cycle.
action: Added defensive guard: check daily.sunset is array with length > 0 and first element is string before access; throw descriptive Error on missing data so caller can log meaningful diagnostic instead of silent null.
outcome_evidence: node -c src/weather-fetcher.js passed; opt-worktree.sh commit succeeded; branch auto/opt-weather-fetcher-1783400691 pushed to origin; worktree diff shows 4-line guard added at line 41.
next_suggestion: Merge or reject remaining pending finding SP-ENG-L-002 (now dispatched); once done, audit-cycle-state will reach cycle-complete → trigger next full deep audit on a new project (e.g., shizi or wechat-main).

audit_findings.finding: extractSunsetWindowData assumes daily.sunset[0] exists; empty/missing array throws TypeError, caller silently swallows via catch → null return loses entire city data.
audit_findings.remediation: Guard with Array.isArray + length check; throw descriptive error on missing data.
